ksa_text: Knowledge of model risk management regulatory expectations, including SR 11-7, SS1/23, and EU AI Act requirements as they apply to AI and ML models in regulated industries, including effective challenge, validation, and ongoing monitoring obligations.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk & Compliance appears in approximately 92% of SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer job postings. Regulatory compliance (FDA, EU MDR, ISO standards) is the primary competency for SaMD QRA roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Risk & Compliance is market-validated for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer. Final decision: include.
